London Cancer Risk Explorer

Influencing Team · Borough-level intelligence for MP briefings
Sources: OHID Fingertips · NHS England · ONS · NCRAS

Select a borough

Click any borough on the map

Click on any London borough to see cancer risk indicators, NHS waiting times, and screening uptake rates.
Data note: Live data from OHID Fingertips. Smoking, obesity and deprivation are borough-level. Cancer incidence and screening are ICB-level (smallest published geography). Late-stage diagnosis and 62-day wait are borough-level estimates.
